category_sources: Official repository README repeats that it is apt for fonts and a font manager for macOS/Linux.
source_facts.description says fnt is apt for fonts, a font manager for macOS/Linux.
display_name_sources: Official repository title and README use fnt.
docs_sources: Official GitHub repository README is the available documentation surface.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is already populated with https://github.com/alexmyczko/fnt, so repo is returned as null per instruction.
tags_sources: Official repository topics include macos, cli, fonts, typography, debian, and ubuntu.
source_facts.description identifies font management on macOS/Linux.
